name: Wheat
irrigation_schedule: Critical at crown root initiation, tillering, jointing, flowering, and milk stages; 4–6 irrigations typical under canal/tube-well in North India.
fertilizer_plan: Basal: 50–60 kg N + full P2O5 and K2O per acre; top-dress remaining N in 2 splits at tillering and late jointing; prefer FYM 4–6 t/acre or balanced NPK per soil test.

name: Rice
irrigation_schedule: Maintain 2–5 cm standing water in vegetative phase; intermittent drying at tillering; AWD where suitable.
fertilizer_plan: Split N (3 doses): basal, tillering, panicle initiation; 48–56 kg N/acre with P/K per soil test; Zn on deficient soils.

name: Cotton
irrigation_schedule: Irrigate at square formation, flowering, and boll development; 8–12 irrigations common.
fertilizer_plan: Higher K for fibre; 40–50 kg N/acre in splits; B, Zn on deficient black soils; IPM for bollworms.

name: Tomato
irrigation_schedule: Drip preferred; frequent light irrigations; avoid leaf wetting; more water during fruit enlargement.
fertilizer_plan: Staged NPK via fertigation; calcium nitrate at fruit set; mulch; soil test for K and micronutrients.

name: Potato
irrigation_schedule: Light frequent irrigations after planting; critical at tuber initiation and bulking; stop 10–15 days before harvest.
fertilizer_plan: High K; 80–100 kg N/acre in splits; boron if deficient; ridge planting with earthing up.

name: Maize
irrigation_schedule: Critical at knee-high, tasselling, and grain filling; 4–6 irrigations if monsoon breaks.
fertilizer_plan: Basal NPK; top-dress N at knee-high; Zn on deficient red soils; proper population for hybrids.

name: Sugarcane
irrigation_schedule: 12–18 irrigations/season; critical tillering, grand growth, maturity; trash mulch.
fertilizer_plan: Heavy split N (180–220 kg N/acre plant crop region norms); P/K; trash incorporation.

name: Mustard
irrigation_schedule: Mostly rainfed; 1–2 lifesaving irrigations at flowering and siliqua filling if dry.
fertilizer_plan: Lower N than cereals; sulphur essential; boron on sands; timely sowing for aphid management.

name: Groundnut
irrigation_schedule: Critical at flowering and peg penetration; avoid waterlogging; 4–6 irrigations if irrigated.
fertilizer_plan: Gypsum at pegging; rhizobium + moderate P; rotation to reduce aflatoxin risk.

name: Soybean
irrigation_schedule: Sensitive at flowering and pod fill; 2–4 irrigations if monsoon breaks.
fertilizer_plan: Rhizobium; modest N; P/K per soil test; Mo on acidic soils; avoid waterlogging.

name: Onion
irrigation_schedule: Frequent light irrigations in nursery and field; reduce before maturity for curing.
fertilizer_plan: Staged N; last split before bulb initiation; high K; S for pungency.

name: Chilli
irrigation_schedule: Drip ideal; steady moisture at flowering and fruit set.
fertilizer_plan: Higher K for colour and pungency; split N; IPM for thrips and mites.

name: Mango
irrigation_schedule: Young trees: weekly in dry months; bearing: flowering to pea-size fruit; reduce before harvest.
fertilizer_plan: FYM/compost by canopy; NPK in 2 splits post-harvest and pre-flowering; micronutrient sprays.

name: Banana
irrigation_schedule: Daily or alternate-day drip in summer; ensure drainage in monsoon.
fertilizer_plan: Very high K; monthly fertigation or split solids; desuckering and propping.

name: Turmeric
irrigation_schedule: Frequent light irrigations after planting until monsoon; critical in rhizome development.
fertilizer_plan: Heavy FYM/compost; NPK in splits; boron if needed; mulching.
